channel.title: System Resource Hub
channel.description: Last 10 notes on System Resource Hub

item.title: PluralLog
item.description: PluralLog is a system logging tool designed for tracking fronting, switches, and internal activity over time, helping plural systems keep structured records of their experiences.

item.title: Ampersand
item.description: Ampersand is a plural system management tool for tracking members, fronting, and system information, with a focus on simplicity and ease of use. This app is offline-by-design and privacy focused.

item.title: Antar
item.description: Antar is an internal chat app designed for self-dialogue, often used by plural systems to communicate between headmates, leave messages, and organize internal conversations.

item.title: FileGarden
item.description: FileGarden is a simple file hosting service for uploading and sharing images and other assets via direct links, commonly used for profiles, system tools, and websites.

item.title: Hivemind
item.description: Hivemind is a plural system management tool designed for tracking members, fronting, and system activity. It provides a centralized space for systems to organize information, log switches, and keep track of internal dynamics.

item.title: Lighthouse
item.description: Lighthouse is an internal communication app designed for plural systems to leave messages, share updates, and communicate across time and headmates.

item.title: Ourcana
item.description: Ourcana is a system management and profile tool that allows plural systems to create public or private profiles for members, track fronting, and organize system information.

item.title: PluralKit
item.description: PluralKit is a Discord bot that allows plural systems to proxy messages as different members, track fronting, and manage system information. It is widely used by DID/OSDD systems and other plural users to communicate more clearly on Discord while maintaining distinct identities for each member.

item.title: PluralSync
item.description: PluralSync is a cloud service where users can automatically sync their plural systems' fronting status between various system managers and social platforms such as SimplyPlural, PluralKit, VRChat, Discord, or their own website.

item.title: ScratchFront
item.description: ScratchFront is a lightweight tool for displaying front status. This tool is part of [ScratchUpload](/tools/scratchupload). and uses your uploaded images for member avatars.
